free_text: Analysis of the F-19(p,a0)O-16 reaction at low
energies and the spectroscopy of Ne-20.
The target was a LiF layer, thickness 94 mug/cm**2
thick, isotopically enriched in Li-6 at 95%, evaporated
on a thin, 18 mug/cm**2 carbon backing.
The detection system consisted of 12 silicon
detectors with energy resolution better than 0.7% for
the charge integration, target thickness and solid
